data.name: King of Phoenix
data.detailed_description:
關注焦點


關於此遊戲

King of Phoenix is a comedic adult harem dating sim set in sunny Phoenix, Arizona. Play as Dan Miller, a British journalist who is forced to take a layover in Phoenix and meets a couple of very lovely ladies there. What treasures lie in wait for him in this city? Money? Friendship? Passion? Waifus?



Experience the sexiest layover known to man as you spend a few decadent days in a resort and watch your “Phoenix” rise through the ashes!

  • A hilarious and sexy storyline
  • Anime characters
  • Four possible endings
  • Plenty of “entertaining” CGs
  • Lovely Waifus to charm
  • A sexy and very funky OST

data.supported_languages: 英文, 俄文, 簡體中文, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 德文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Vista or higher
  • 處理器: 1Ghz
  • 記憶體: 1 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Integrated Graphics Chip
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 500 MB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Vista or higher
  • 處理器: 2Ghz
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Integrated Graphics Chip
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 500 MB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: OS X version Leopard 10.5.8 or later
  • 處理器: 1.66 Ghz
  • 記憶體: 1 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Integrated Graphics Chip
  • 儲存空間: 500 MB 可用空間
mac_requirements.recommended:
